allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json;[json.loads\(l\) for l in open\('notes/transcript-sample.jsonl'\) if l.strip\(\)]; print\('all 7 lines valid JSON'\)")

Bash(sed -i 's/expect\("claude op id"\)/expect\("bot op id"\)/g; s/"load claude state"/"load bot state"/g; s/"state cleared on success \(claude\)"/"state cleared on success \(bot\)"/; s/"load claude sync state"/"load bot sync state"/; s/"claude state present after failure"/"bot state present after failure"/; s/"claude state = pre-sync op"/"bot state = pre-sync op"/; s/"claude state cleared by revert"/"bot state cleared by revert"/' src/sync/integration_tests.rs)
Bash(sed -i 's/`--scope` is keyword-only \(`code|bot|code,bot|bot,code`\)/`--scope` is keyword-only \(`work|bot|work,bot|bot,work`\)/; s/use `--scope=code"/use `--scope=work"/' src/common.rs)

Bash(sed -i 's/keywords were given in \(`code,bot` vs `bot,code`\)/keywords were given in \(`work,bot` vs `bot,work`\)/' src/options_flags/scope.rs)
